messages.content: 开发不同种类的敏感电极材料以及贵金属掺杂是其中的代表性方法。翻译成英语
Developing different types of sensitive electrode materials and doping with noble metals is one of the representative methods.
首先我想先介绍本实验室在开发新型敏感电极材料方面的进展
First, I would like to introduce the progress of our laboratory in developing new types of sensitive electrode materials.
通过改变材料的烧结温度改变材料的孔隙率，探索孔隙率对传感器气敏性能的影响。
By changing the sintering temperature of the material, we can manipulate the porosity of the material and explore the influence of porosity on the gas sensing performance of the sensor.
钇稳定氧化锆
Yttria-stabilized zirconia
室温条件下比较稳定的钾离子导体，钠离子导体，锂离子导体有哪些，有哪些应用在气体传感器领域

At room temperature, some stable potassium ion conductors include potassium tantalate (KTaO3) and potassium niobate (KNbO3). Some stable sodium ion conductors include sodium beta-alumina (Naβ-Al2O3) and sodium superionic conductor (NASICON). Stable lithium ion conductors include lithium niobate (LiNbO3) and lithium borate (LiBOB). 

In gas sensor applications, these ion conductors can be used as solid electrolytes in a variety of gas sensors. They can help facilitate the migration of ions in response to the target gas, allowing for the generation of a measurable electrical signal. The specific gas sensing applications vary depending on the sensor design and the target gas being detected, but some examples include detecting and monitoring toxic gases, such as carbon monoxide (CO) or nitrogen dioxide (NO2), in industrial environments or air quality monitoring.
翻译成英语。 在汽车尾气中，NOX是一种重要的污染标志物。研制以钙钛矿结构材料CoTiO3作为敏感电极材料的NO2混成电位型气体传感器。该传感器表现出较好的选择性及灵敏度。同时测试极化曲线显示出该材料对NO2表现出较高的催化活性，对100ppmNO2的响应值是近几年文献报道的最高水平。

In automobile emissions, NOX is an important pollutant marker. A NO2 mixed potential gas sensor was developed using a perovskite-type structured material, CoTiO3, as the sensitive electrode material. The sensor exhibited good selectivity and sensitivity. Additionally, polarization curves showed that the material exhibited high catalytic activity towards NO2, with a response value of 100ppm NO2 reaching the highest level reported in recent years.
为了消除NO2的排放，在柴油发动机汽车中尝尝使用SCR系统，引入氨气将氮氧化物转换为N2与水，未反应的氨气排放一样会污染环境。因此还需建立高温氨气传感器。

To mitigate the emissions of NO2, SCR systems are commonly used in diesel engine vehicles, wherein ammonia is introduced to convert nitrogen oxides into N2 and water. However, unreacted ammonia emissions can also contribute to environmental pollution. Therefore, it is necessary to develop high-temperature ammonia gas sensors.
硫化物同样是一种由汽车尾气排放对环境污染较大的气体。开发出多种不同电极材料用于SO2的检测。开发出三种不同的钙钛矿材料ZnTiO3 CoTiO3, NiTiO3，其中基于ZnTiO3敏感电极材料的传感器对1ppmSO2的响应值最高，具有100ppb的检测下限。

Sulfur dioxide (SO2) is another gas emitted from automobile exhaust that contributes significantly to environmental pollution. Multiple electrode materials have been developed for the detection of SO2. Three different perovskite materials, namely ZnTiO3, CoTiO3, and NiTiO3, have been developed. Among them, the sensor based on ZnTiO3 as the sensitive electrode material exhibited the highest response value to 1ppm SO2 and had a detection limit of 100ppb.
简单的金属氧化物复合电极也被用于SO2检测，这种符合材料具有响应恢复时间快，稳定性好等优点。
Simple metal oxide composite electrodes have also been used for SO2 detection. These composite materials have advantages such as fast response and recovery time, as well as good stability.
H2S也是一种重要的污染源，开发出Co2SnO4用于SO2检测，检测下限低至100ppb，灵敏度为54.5mv/decade,同时具有较好的抗湿型和长期稳定性。

H2S is also an important pollutant, and Co2SnO4 has been developed for the detection of SO2. The detection limit can reach as low as 100ppb, with a sensitivity of 54.5mV/decade. Additionally, it exhibits good resistance to humidity and long-term stability.

VOC气体也是汽车尾气排放的重要污染物。开发Cd2SnO4为敏感电极的混成电位型Acetone气体传感器，该传感器的检测下限低至50ppb响应恢复时间低于5s，表现出较好的响应恢复特性。同时CuSb2O6也被用于ACE检测，并用于检测呼气的丙酮含量检测糖尿病，该传感器表现出较好的响应恢复特性于稳定性，在设置合适的阈值后可有效检测糖尿病。
一些铌钙矿结构的材料也被开发出来用于VOC气体的检测。以NiSb2O6为敏感电极材料的传感器对甲醇气体的检测下限低至0.1ppm，表现出优秀的选择性及稳定性。

Volatile organic compounds (VOCs) are also important pollutants emitted from automobile exhaust. Cd2SnO4 has been developed as a sensitive electrode for a mixed potential type acetone gas sensor. This sensor has a detection limit as low as 50ppb and a response recovery time of less than 5s, demonstrating excellent response recovery characteristics. CuSb2O6 has also been used for ACE detection, particularly for detecting acetone content in exhaled breath for diabetes diagnosis. This sensor exhibits good response recovery characteristics and stability, and can effectively detect diabetes when appropriate thresholds are set.

Various niobate perovskite materials have also been developed for VOC gas detection. Sensors using NiSb2O6 as the sensitive electrode material have a detection limit as low as 0.1ppm for methanol gas and exhibit excellent selectivity and stability.
钙钛矿型电极材料NiTiO3也被开发出来用于乙醇的检测，对乙醇的检测下限低至0.2ppm，对乙醇的响应恢复时间小于30秒同时具有较好的抗湿性。

Perovskite-type electrode material NiTiO3 has also been developed for ethanol detection. This sensor has a detection limit as low as 0.2ppm for ethanol and a response recovery time of less than 30 seconds. It also exhibits good humidity resistance.
